name: @ghostchain/zk
description: ZK-SNARK circuits for GhostChain protocol - private ghost transfer proofs

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/ghostTransfer.r1cs ptau/powersOfTau28_heafe_16.ptau build/circuit.zkey
scripts.export:vk: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/circuit.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove build/circuit.zkey build/witness.wtns build/proof.json build/public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
